title: Gray's Stuff & Things
description: A collection of various things. Some useful, some less useful.
body:
Please note: This mod will not be receiving updates.

## What is "Gray's Stuff & Things?"
This mod aims to add various recipes and items.

## What it adds
Currently the mod adds:
- The "Ritual Table", which lets you convert specific combinations of items into another.
- Backports of the Music Discs from 1.21.
- Edible Gunpowder.
- A plush you can store items in.
- New recipes for preexisting items, such as a Deepslate recipe or a Dragon Egg recipe.

## Why would you want this?
This mod is a good choice if you're looking for simpler ways to obtain saplings and spawn eggs. It's also good for servers if you want to ensure the dragon egg can be obtainable by multiple players to avoid scarcity.

## Addendum
The mod requires [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) in order to work fully. 

The full list of rituals and recipes can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ZyLdj8j2WXkY4a8xT_6wh_bZJ6QAx8jJ_FNyyvScIEw/edit?usp=sharing).
